description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, and deploy and set the variables GIT_STRATEGY=clone, LANG=en_US.UTF-8, and LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8. Add a job named build in the build stage that runs the commands 'bundle install' and then 'bundle exec fastlane build', and configure it to upload all generated .ipa files as artifacts. No Docker image, services, caches, or special rules are required for this pipeline.
